datasets.name: vendedores_ranking
queryLines:
SELECT
  seller_id,
  seller_name,
  SUM(sales_quantity) as total_sales_quantity,
  SUM(billing) as total_billing,
  SUM(profit) as total_profit,
  SUM(product_quantity) as total_product_quantity
FROM
  workspace.pj_sales.vw_rank_by_store_seller
GROUP BY
  seller_id,
  seller_name
ORDER BY
  SUM(billing) DESC
